title: Animated and Alive
description:
A modpack made to make mc more alive and animated. It adds Improved visuals and effects to make the game better.

There is a curseforge mod for the 1.21.1 version https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ydms-weapon-master
body: This modpack includes many mods and recourses such as Fresh animations, Wakes, Better fog, Dynamic Lights, Camera overhaul, First person model, Panda's falling tree, Sodium, Lithium, C2ME, Noisium, and a couple other performance and qol mods
